code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let ts = parse_ints(line2)
  let t = match list.get(ts, 0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut filtered: List<Int> = []
  for x in nums
    if x > t
      filtered = list.push(filtered, x)
    end
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in filtered
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
